summary: Complete the operator-facing dashboard and records flows, then document how to verify the local MVP end to end.

steps.name: build-dashboard-query-layer
steps.summary: Added organization-scoped dashboard query services for recent submissions, recent updates, pending sessions, and setup-gap detection.

steps.name: implement-dashboard-ui
steps.summary: Rebuilt /dashboard with messenger-like grouped panels for next actions, submission overview, recent submissions, updates, and pending sessions.

steps.name: implement-records-browser
steps.summary: Implemented /records list and detail views with search/status filtering and operator-only inspection of attendance, journal, and attachments.

steps.name: document-local-smoke-path
steps.summary: Documented the end-to-end local smoke path, including explicit attachment blocked behavior when storage bucket config is missing.
